tip_blast: Blast radius: highlight all files affected if this file changes (red=direct, orange=2 hops, yellow=3).
tip_autodocs: Auto-docs: open/close auto-generated docs (summary, params, deps) for this file.
tip_center: Center node: pan & zoom the graph so the selected node is centered.
tip_nav: Navigate to file: close the panel and jump the graph to this node.
tip_search: Search files: filter the graph by name; non-matching nodes fade. Local, no server round-trip.
tip_reindex: Reindex: re-scan all code files and rebuild the dependency map. ~30s–2min.
tip_fit: Fit to screen: adjust zoom/position so all nodes are visible.
tip_health: Health color: color nodes by code health score (green=good, red=problematic).
tip_folder: Folder color: color nodes by their source folder/directory.
tip_layer: Layer color: color by architecture layer (UI/API/Data/Service/Util/Test/Core).
tip_blast2: Blast radius mode: color nodes by change impact reach from the selected file.
tip_tour: Guided tour: ordered list of 15 files to read first to understand the codebase.
tip_zombie: Show zombie files: files not imported by anyone and importing nothing (dead-code candidates).
zombie_panel: Zombie Files — not imported, importing nothing
tip_enrich: Add a MEANING layer (LLM) to the self-map: summary/domain/role per file (R6)
zombie_advisory: Weak heuristic (Go imports are package-level): these are CANDIDATES for manual review — DO NOT auto-delete. Verify with grep / go build first.
